app.title: Engaging Reader
upload.label: 上传文件
upload.ariaLabel: 上传文档：点击浏览文件或拖放。支持：图片和 PDF 文件，最大 50MB
disclaimer.bold: Engaging Reader 不适合处理敏感的个人数据。
disclaimer.regular: 请勿上传包含财务信息、政府身份证号码、医疗详情或其他机密内容的文档。
status.extracted: 文本提取成功。按空格键开始朗读，或按 Tab 键浏览词语。
errors.selectFileVisible: 请先选择一个图片文件。
errors.invalidType: 文件类型无效。请选择图片或 PDF 文件。
errors.invalidTypeVisible: 请选择有效文件（JPEG、PNG、HEIC、WebP 或 PDF）。
errors.fileTooLarge: 文件太大。请选择小于 50MB 的文件。
errors.fileTooLargeVisible: 文件大小超过 50MB 限制。请选择较小的文件。

__source__.app.title: Engaging Reader
__source__.upload.label: Upload File
__source__.upload.ariaLabel: Upload document: click to browse files or drag and drop. Supported: Images and PDF files up to 50MB
__source__.disclaimer.bold: Engaging Reader is not intended to handle sensitive personal data.
__source__.disclaimer.regular: Please do not upload documents with financial information, government ID numbers, medical details, or other confidential content.
__source__.status.extracted: Text extracted successfully. Use spacebar to start reading or tab to navigate words.
__source__.errors.selectFileVisible: Please select an image file first.
__source__.errors.invalidType: Invalid file type. Please select an image or PDF file.
__source__.errors.invalidTypeVisible: Please select a valid file (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, WebP, or PDF).
__source__.errors.fileTooLarge: File too large. Please choose a file under 50MB.
__source__.errors.fileTooLargeVisible: File size exceeds 50MB limit. Please choose a smaller file.
__source__.errors.processFailed: Failed to process file. Please try again.
